subcodes.first_line: All praise, sanctified beyond the understanding of created things, befitteth Him Who is the Lord of our hearts' Desire, Who, with but a single glance of loving-kindness, causeth the merest atom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان کائنات حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که بیک نظر عنایت ذره را
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @oneness; unity of religion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
